hero.title: Your address in Portugal,
hero.subtitle: Get a Portuguese postal address in seconds. Shop on any European site and receive your parcels at home in Morocco — fast and secure.

howItWorks.title: How does it
howItWorks.subtitle: From creating your account to delivery at your door — four simple steps.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.desc: Free registration in 2 minutes. Instantly get your virtual address in Portugal, ready to use.

step2.title: Shop online
step2.desc: Use your Portuguese address on any European e-commerce site: Amazon, Zara, IKEA, ASOS and many more.

step3.title: We consolidate
step3.desc: We receive, check and group all your parcels in our Lisbon warehouse before shipping.

step4.title: Delivery to Morocco
step4.desc: Your parcels are shipped, cleared through customs and delivered to your door anywhere in Morocco in 5–7 business days.

howItWorks.ctaNote: Ready to start? Create your account for free in 2 minutes.

plans.title: Plans tailored to
plans.subtitle: Start for free and upgrade as your needs grow. No commitment, cancel anytime.

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Ideal for getting started with European shopping.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For regular shoppers who want the best service.

plans.noTax: All prices are in euros, excluding taxes.

carriers.title: Fast delivery
carriers.subtitle: We work with the best international carriers to guarantee reliability and speed.

guarantees.transitDesc: Indicated times are in business days from parcel pick-up.
guarantees.trackingDesc: Receive a tracking number upon shipping and follow your parcel at every step.
guarantees.insuranceDesc: All shipments are insured against loss and damage up to the declared value.

simulator.title: Price Simulator
simulator.subtitle: Estimate shipping cost from Lisbon to Morocco
simulator.volumetricNote: Volumetric weight will be used if greater than actual weight.
simulator.customsNote: Used to estimate Moroccan customs duties (~2.5%).
simulator.disclaimer: Indicative estimate. Final amount may vary based on actual weight and customs decisions.
simulator.emptyDesc: Fill in your parcel details and click "Calculate cost" to get an estimate.

customs.title: Estimate your
customs.subtitle: Enter your item description (in French, English or Arabic) and declared value — our AI engine identifies the Moroccan HS code and calculates import duty, VAT and parafiscal tax.
customs.descPlaceholder: e.g. iPhone 15 Pro, Nike Air Max, women's dress...
customs.disclaimer: Indicative estimate based on the Moroccan tariff nomenclature. Actual duties may vary depending on origin, trade agreements (Morocco-EU FTA) and customs office decision. Exchange rate used: 1 € = 11 MAD.
